## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` / `docs` / `ci`
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE`

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] CI passes

## Security flag

- [ ] This change touches auth, token handling, or the encryption boundary

<!-- If checked: describe the change and its security implications below -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing
- [ ] `docs/` updated if architecture or API changed
- [ ] ADR added for significant architecture decisions

Closes #
